goal.value: FIXED: Biometric login bug - JJWT version mismatch (0.12.5 vs 0.12.6) caused claims.getSubject() to return jti instead of sub

progress.value:
✅ FIXED: Biometric login bug in commit 23d18fa
- Root cause: JJWT version mismatch (0.12.5 vs 0.12.6) 
- Fix: Upgraded keycloak-extension to JJWT 0.12.6
- Debug logging added to LoginTokenAuthenticator
- All 61 E2E tests pass
- Pushed to origin/main

context.value:
Modified files:
- AuthService.java:104-110 (added logging: userId, keycloakUserId)

Bug manifestation:
- Keycloak sees sub='<UUID>' in JWT (e.g. 3c51afd0-344b-45ab-8b63-7940e889c5cd)
- Should be sub='<plaintext-userId>' (e.g. 'e2e-user-1772478103382-1')
- Error: "No user found for federated identity"

Flow: AuthService.verifyChallenge() → device.getUserId() → jwtService.issueKeycloakAssertionToken(userId, ACR) → JWT sub=userId → Keycloak LoginTokenAuthenticator → federated_identity lookup by sub

Beads: auth-sandbox-wmt (in_progress, not closed)
